Feature:AMO001 Get Member Wallet Balance 99ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet balance API
So that I can retrieve the member wallet balance for one or more currencies

Scenario:
Get balances for requested currencies
40ms 4

Given a merchant member exists 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 38ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.875,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.875,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain balances for: < 1ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]

Validation fails when platform username is empty
13ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 12ms
field value
platform_username
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"

Request:

        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:

          "platform_username": "invalid_username",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]

          "status": 404,
          "body": {

            "code": 404,

          }

        }

          "status": 400,

                "message": "\"currencies\" must contain at least 1 items"

Validation fails when a currency in the array is invalid
18ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:

Info 

Setup:

        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 17ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["USD","MYR","INVALID"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              },
              {
                "key": "currencies.2",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:

          "currencies": [

            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {

                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"

Feature:AMO013 Notify Wager Update < 1ms 3

As APISYS
I want to notify the merchant of wager updates

Scenario:
Successful wager notification
< 1ms 2

When APISYS notifies wager update with: < 1ms 

{
  "notification_type": "typeA",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "IMSPORT",
      "game_key": "IMSPORT",
      "wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-3",
      "origin_wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-1",
      "ticket_no": "ticketno_123",
      "platform_username": "member01",
      "type": 3,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": 1720694402,
      "settlement_time": 1720698600,
      "is_system_reward": true
    },
    {
      "game_type": "CRASH",
      "game_key": "CRASH_V2",
      "wager_no": "0002-20250117140015-188011927398-1",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": null,
      "platform_username": "member02",
      "type": 1,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 5.1,
      "payment_amount": 5.1,
      "effective_amount": 5,
      "profit_and_loss": 0,
      "wager_time": 1720694403,
      "settlement_time": null,
      "is_system_reward": false
    }
  ]
}
 

Then(/^APISYS notifies wager update with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO013 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO013 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:AMO003 Seamless Request Payment 335ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant request payment API
So that I can deduct wager payment from the member wallet

Scenario:
Successful request payment deducts wallet balance
160ms 8

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 17ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.875
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    CNY:
        100.875

field value

transaction_no <transaction_no>

Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "c9cbea97-8297-4efc-a4a7-7b7bea860530",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-90.875"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "6b2dca82-1ec0-4f57-abae-ff069cf78c14",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS requests payment with: 18ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount 5
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "b57ce941-0028-4861-b261-48e4dd930235",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "5"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "\"amount\" must be a negative number"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

        }

          "status": 400,

parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>
payment_order_no <payment_order_no>

  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:AMO007 Seamless Settle Wager 419ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant settle wager API
So that I can apply wager settlement results to the member wallet

Scenario:
Full settlement increases wallet by settlement amount
107ms 6

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info +

    platform_username:

transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type>
currency <currency>
amount 25.75
effective_amount 25.75
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info +

          "transaction_no": "3266c4a3-3515-44e6-94cd-461e57891123",
          "game_key": "GGL",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773984010762-736xr3",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "25.75",
          "effective_amount": "25.75",
          "settlement_time": "1773984010",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "f3648aba-fc82-4f33-8463-9e9e2c686396",
            "origin_order_no": "600ed411-816e-41f6-a749-da5c5648fd34",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "f9180033-5912-4c33-988b-02d5b332f194"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }

        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "7bbcc6dd-8afe-4382-ab92-934b88a1bc5a"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

        11.5
    Expected:
        47.25

When APISYS settles a wager with: 53ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type>
currency <currency>
amount -5
effective_amount -5
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
partial_settlement_history [{ "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_1>", "amount": -8, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }, { "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_2>", "amount": -12, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "388a18ea-ed4b-4bde-bd9d-21e650d3bd0b",
          "game_key": "GGL",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773984011004-4eegfc",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-5",
          "effective_amount": "-5",
          "settlement_time": "1773984011",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "26a8ee18-7486-4a34-8fc0-ade5bd6f66cf",
            "origin_order_no": "e89dd58f-66cb-4785-9e13-b96380f69aa3",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "3d65ff66-64c8-417c-9906-5dfe61ee1e0a"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false",
          "partial_settlement_history": [
            {
              "transaction_no": "925ff275-d1d1-45fb-a3c6-5a637a568619",
              "amount": -8,
              "settlement_time": 1773984011
            },
            {
              "transaction_no": "5bace10f-dbdc-488c-bcf9-92ee893379df",
              "amount": -12,
              "settlement_time": 1773984011
            }
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "d8d3ac88-9d82-4a84-b8ec-11be427047b9"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
effective_amount 1.1234567
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "fde334d3-eede-448a-93b3-3a29d332f951",
          "game_key": "GGL",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773984011177-4oqaqj",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "effective_amount": "1.1234567",
          "settlement_time": "1773984011",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "47970d88-f283-4f0d-9d0a-7a473ab40029",
            "origin_order_no": "b1b16b90-cb6f-462e-b65c-d93195db67a0",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "2209195b-d800-41d5-92f7-85bab6bf352f"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

And a prepared paid wager fixture exists for: < 1ms
field value
wager_no <wager_no>
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>
payment_order_no <payment_order_no>
currency <currency>
payment_amount 30 

Then(/^a prepared paid wager fixture exists for:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS cancels a wager with: < 1ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
wager_no <wager_no> 

Then(/^APISYS cancels a wager with:$/, function(callback) {

  callback(null, 'pending');
});

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 30 < 1ms

I want to call the merchant resettle wager API
So that I can apply corrected settlement amounts

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 34.75
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        22.25
    After:
        34.75
    Expected increase:
        12.5
    Expected:
        34.75

When APISYS resettles a wager with: 49ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
ticket_no <ticket_no>
origin_wager_no <origin_wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -4.25
effective_amount <effective_amount>
type <wager_type>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
wager_time <wager_time>
settlement_time <settlement_time>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/resettle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "51cd6c49-731e-44e5-9d08-89931600cdad",
          "game_key": "GGL",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773984011304-45ns9m",
          "ticket_no": "",
          "origin_wager_no": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-4.25",
          "effective_amount": "",
          "type": "1",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "6a9dd642-28d1-47b2-b883-3d98241f519c",
            "origin_order_no": "25694f21-272c-42a2-880f-799512663adf",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "2dc19e31-f3a3-4e33-8ae2-1bd4d864b6d8"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "wager_time": "",
          "settlement_time": "1773984011",
          "is_system_reward": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "73a3407f-59bf-4caf-a6a6-a9b674e2db53"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info

Then the AMO009 response should be successful < 1ms

field value
reference_id any non-empty value

Feature:Integration Flow - Request payment then cancel wager < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify paid wager cancellation refund flow end to end

Scenario:
Request payment 30 then cancel wager refunds the same 30
< 1ms 10 1

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

currency balance
<currency> 100 

Then(/^the member wallet has balances:$/, function(callback) {

  callback(null, 'pending');
});

wager_no
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

transaction_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -30

  callback(null, 'pending');
});

  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And a request payment transaction exists with: < 1ms

order_no <transaction_uuid_1>
currency <currency>
amount -30

payment_amount 30

Scenario:
Repeating the same transfer_no is idempotent
128ms 12

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",

field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 12ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "76ea18c9-f884-48b7-a3b9-d78998de900c",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "9e8e9f58-9e81-4870-8bb8-3d234a2fecaa"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

    API:

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 39ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 10
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "0c4913ee-0986-43b1-9ccf-fbd339d32989",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "10",
          "session_id": "3d2d5cae-116a-4332-b110-3c456ccd68e9"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "6e49aff1-98d8-4a3c-8da4-1f5bc8cb56df",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info

Feature:AMO011 Request Transfer Out 662ms 9 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer out API
So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer out decreases wallet balance
94ms 7

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 14ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        175.625

Info

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,

            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 45ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -20.5
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "c57485de-997b-4d56-8cfd-f4d372011d0e",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "aed291f9-8e09-4807-a33d-abbad08ff07e"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "8fbf4d95-840a-4815-9cec-f72bce8d446e",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "c57485de-997b-4d56-8cfd-f4d372011d0e",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "aed291f9-8e09-4807-a33d-abbad08ff07e"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "8fbf4d95-840a-4815-9cec-f72bce8d446e",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -20.5
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5 19ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 155.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        175.625
    After:
        155.125
    Expected decrease:
        20.5
    Expected:
        155.125

Info

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

        }

    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "b27de36f-32ce-4b05-a28f-c41dbd9b0843",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",

        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -15
status 1

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "amo011_reference_id" < 1ms Show Info + 
Stored:
    amo011_reference_id:
        90e57ce5-16f6-408b-b3e2-705cd2a18bd8

Info 

Stored:
    amo011_reference_id:
        90e57ce5-16f6-408b-b3e2-705cd2a18bd8

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 15 15ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 140.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        155.125
    After:
        140.125

        15
    Expected:
        140.125

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 140.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

        155.125
    After:
        140.125
    Expected decrease:
        15

          "transfer_no": "2d234db4-e610-4400-8837-a745557aa7f9",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",

          "amount": "-150.125",
          "session_id": "01c0bdbc-5473-4141-b286-33be3141630f"
        }

          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "2d234db4-e610-4400-8837-a745557aa7f9",
              "amount": 0,
              "status": 2
            },
            "message": "Success"

        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the response amount should equal the integer part of the recorded wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should equal the remaining decimal balance 24ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        140.125
    After:
        0.125
    Expected:
        0.125

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 20ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "6ddf040e-ad6b-429f-a608-51acf23a9bd6",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-1.1234567",
          "session_id": "f0a25d8f-5a69-4fed-b26b-93cbaded9e4d"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 13ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
currency <currency>
amount -10
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "14caa26f-e830-4fe9-9408-9440c7b41348",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-10",
          "session_id": "0ca6dd81-ba2a-4724-9e20-4d0687dab4d8"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is required"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Feature:AMO014 Request Cancel Transfer 184ms 3

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel transfer API
So that I can reverse a previous transfer ledger

Scenario:
Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer in and is idempotent
89ms 9

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given a successful transfer in exists for: 35ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 20
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "f1c5573c-9dfc-48f9-937c-05eba2d29de6",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "20",
          "session_id": "ba7470fc-bc47-4dad-9cfa-432ee7246208"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "d46b0657-4952-49ed-a796-a8524360b0be",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "f1c5573c-9dfc-48f9-937c-05eba2d29de6",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "20",

        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "d46b0657-4952-49ed-a796-a8524360b0be",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

          "status": 200,

            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "4690a871-a499-44c8-85e7-6c5f5be9a88a"

        }

reference_id any non-empty value

Scenario:
Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer out and is idempotent
70ms 10

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 14ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        0.125

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged < 1ms

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer out all integer balance < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer APIs in sequence
So that I can verify full integer-balance withdrawal behavior end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in 120.5 then transfer out without amount deducts 120 and leaves 0.5
< 1ms 7 4

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer in with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 120.5

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 120.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 120.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer out with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
status success
amount 120

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 0.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 0.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: < 1ms
platform_username
currencies <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain balances: < 1ms
0.5 

Then(/^the response should contain balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "cac77900-38a6-4af3-9ed9-0da12055db14",
              "amount": -35,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
